steps.title: Use the vertical-shift shortcut
steps.content: Data set B is created by subtracting $9$ from every $y$-value in data set A. That moves the entire line of best fit down $9$ units without changing its slope.

steps.title: Adjust the intercept
steps.content: The line of best fit for data set A has $y$-intercept about $54.57$. Shifting the line down $9$ units gives $54.57-9=45.57$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The $y$-intercept for data set B is closest to $45.57$, which matches choice A.
